name: Blond Fruitcake (Fat-free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pineapple, apricots, and peaches into 1/2 inch dice and combine in a large bowl.
2. Add flour to the fruit mixture and toss to coat.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together sugar, baking powder, and flour.
4. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
5. In a small bowl, combine applesauce, egg whites, vanilla, and lemon extract.
6. Stir the wet ingredients into the dried fruit mixture.
7. Add the dry flour mixture and stir until fully blended.
8. Spoon the batter into a 9-inch tube pan lightly sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
9. Bake for 3 hours.
10. Let the cake cool in the pan on a rack.
11. Remove from the pan, wrap the cake tightly in clean cheesecloth soaked in orange liqueur, and store it in a covered container in the refrigerator for one month or longer before serving. Occasionally add more liqueur to the cake while storing.
Note: This recipe is provided by J.LEVINSON3 [Jody] on GEnie, posted on December 18, 1992.
